headline: General Motors (GM) Missed The Hybrid Shift As Toyota Closes In
summary: General Motors (NYSE:GM) is losing U.S. market share in the growing hybrid vehicle segment due to limited fuel-efficient offerings. Toyota is on track to overtake GM as the top-selling U.S. automaker by year-end, marking a potential shift in industry leadership. GM now plans to reintroduce plug-in hybrids in North America by 2027 after previously stepping away from this market. General Motors sits at the center of a major reshuffle in the U.S. auto industry as hybrid vehicle sales gain...
